use_cases: Displaying blog posts or articles in a browsable horizontal carousel
Showcasing portfolio projects or case studies with author attribution
Content discovery interface for media platforms and blogs
Feature highlights slider for landing pages and marketing sites
Product or service recommendations with category filtering
ai_summary: A horizontal card slider component featuring article-style cards with images, titles, descriptions, and metadata. Built with Framer Motion for smooth drag and click-based navigation animations. Includes author avatars, category badges, and reading time indicators. Responsive design works across desktop and mobile with navigation chevrons for browsing content.
